name: Shooting Star
description:
Call a comet down from the constellations to blast an enemy, dealing 4067 Flame Damage to all enemies in the area, knocking them down, and stunning them for 2 seconds.

After impact, enemies in the target area take 1161 Flame Damage every 1 second for 11 seconds.

You generate 10 Ultimate for each enemy hit by the initial blast, up to 6 times.
